title: Nucleic Acid Purification
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs a nucleic acid purification protocol based on the MagneSil Plasmid Purification System from Promega. --- To purchase tips, reagents, or pipettes, please visit our Upload your protocol into the OT App.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
